Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
ci\(coverage\): raise test coverage threshold to 70%

- Line coverage: 60% -> 70%
- Branch coverage: 50% -> 55%
- Add [tool.coverage.report] fail_under = 70 to pyproject.toml
- Add coverage roadmap to testing rules \(70 -> 80 -> 90\)
- Omit services/system.py from coverage \(system-level glue\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(echo "=== OPEN PRs ==="
gh pr list --state open --limit 30 --json number,title,statusCheckRollup --jq '.[] | "PR #\\\(.number\) | \\\([.statusCheckRollup[]? | select\(.conclusion == "FAILURE"\) | .name] | if length == 0 then "✓ passing" else "✗ " + join\(", "\) end\) | \\\(.title\)"' 2>&1

echo ""
echo "=== RECENTLY MERGED ==="
gh pr list --state merged --limit 20 --json number,title --jq '.[] | "PR #\\\(.number\) | \\\(.title\)"' 2>&1)

Bash(for pr_num in 53 52 51 50 49 45 19 18 17; do
  echo "=== PR #$pr_num ==="
  gh pr view $pr_num --json number,title,statusCheckRollup --jq '.statusCheckRollup | if length == 0 then "NO CHECKS RUN YET" else . | map\("\\\(.name\): \\\(.conclusion // .status\)"\) | join\("\\n"\) end'
done)

Bash(for pr_num in 49 45; do
  echo "=== PR #$pr_num ==="
  gh pr view $pr_num --json statusCheckRollup --jq '.statusCheckRollup[]'
done)

Bash(echo "=== DETAILED FAILURE ANALYSIS ===" && echo && for pr_num in 53 19; do
  echo "PR #$pr_num Failure Details:"
  gh pr view $pr_num --json statusCheckRollup --jq '.statusCheckRollup[] | select\(.conclusion == "FAILURE" or .status == "FAILURE"\) | "\\\(.name\): \\\(.status\) [\\\(.conclusion\)]"'
  echo
done)

Bash(HFT_CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=changeme timeout 10 uv run python -c "
from hft_platform.monitor._config_loader import load_watchlist
from hft_platform.monitor._engine import MonitorEngine

config = load_watchlist\(\)
engine = MonitorEngine\(config\)
engine.initialize\(\)
print\(f'State: {engine.state.name}'\)

for i in range\(2\):
    engine.poll_and_update\(\)

for ss in engine._sym_states:
    sigs = ', '.join\(f'{aid[:3]}={a.signal:.3f}' for aid, a in ss.alpha_states.items\(\)\)
    print\(f'{ss.symbol.code}: tc={ss.tick_count} comp={ss.composite:.3f} | {sigs}'\)

print\('INTEGRATION PASS'\)
" 2>&1)
